body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-7507", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-290", "name": "Authentication Bypass by Spoofing"}], "description": "A session fixation vulnerability was found in Keycloak's login-actions endpoints. An unauthenticated attacker could exploit this flaw by pre-creating an authentication session and tricking a victim into visiting a maliciously crafted link. By leveraging the /login-actions/restart endpoint—which processes session handles without adequate CSRF protection or cookie ownership validation—an attacker can reset the authentication flow state. This causes Single Sign-On (SSO) to authenticate the victim transparently upon clicking the link, allowing the attacker to hijack the required-action form without needing the victim's credentials. A successful exploit could lead to complete account takeover, including highly privileged administrative accounts.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00568, "percentile": 0.4312}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-hf67-5vvq-fm3r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-04T15:37:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hf67-5vvq-fm3r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-hf67-5vvq-fm3r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-7507"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-19T12:16:19Z", "published_at": "2026-05-19T12:31:42Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-7507", "https://access.redhat.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-7507", "https://bugzilla.redhat.com/show_bug.cgi?id=2464145", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:19594", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:19597", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:19595", "https://access.redhat.com/errata/RHSA-2026:19596", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/pull/49134", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/commit/d791b270b9ea5203be40a9533c1c12c4d044fb52", "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/releases/tag/26.6.2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-hf67-5vvq-fm3r"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak", "summary": "Keycloak: Session fixation in OIDC login flow that can lead to account takeover", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-04T15:37:18Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-hf67-5vvq-fm3r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "26.6.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.keycloak:keycloak-services"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 26.6.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Keycloak: Session fixation in OIDC login flow that can lead to account takeover
